spec.name: Evocation
spec.description: The art of shaping raw magical energy into elemental force. Evokers bend fire, ice, and lightning to their will, trading precision for power as their mastery deepens.

spine.name: Evocation I
spine.description: You attune to the arcane weave and develop a mana pool. Spells draw from this pool, and being struck while casting interrupts your concentration.

spine.name: Evocation II
spine.description: Sustained use of a single element builds resonance within you. Prolonged mono-element casting increases your potency with that element but leaves you more vulnerable to it.

spine.name: Evocation III
spine.description: You can push beyond your mana pool. When mana runs dry, spells begin drawing from your own vitality instead.

spine.name: Evocation IV
spine.description: Your arcane aura is unmistakable. Intelligent enemies identify you as the primary threat and will focus their attention on you.

nodes.name: Attunement
nodes.description: Deepens your connection to the arcane weave, expanding your mana pool.

nodes.name: Arcane Bolt
nodes.description: A focused pulse of raw arcane force. Deals no elemental damage and builds no resonance, making it a reliable fallback when resources are low or you need precision.

nodes.name: Firebolt
nodes.description: A focused bolt of flame that sears a single target. Reliable and mana-efficient — your workhorse at any level.

nodes.name: Frostbite
nodes.description: A lance of frost that damages and chills the target, slowing their actions.

nodes.name: Spark
nodes.description: A quick electrical discharge with high accuracy and a chance to briefly stun the target. Applies the charged condition, increasing crit chance against that target.

nodes.name: Immolate
nodes.description: Wreathed in conjured flame, the target burns for several ticks of fire damage. Lower immediate damage than Firebolt but higher total — and dangerous to leave unfinished.

nodes.name: Flash Freeze
nodes.description: Encases the target in a shell of ice, preventing all action for a short time. Deals minimal damage — this is pure control.

nodes.name: Static Field
nodes.description: Releases a pulse of electricity through the room, applying the charged condition to every entity present. Modest damage on its own — the value is in the setup.

nodes.name: Counterspell
nodes.description: When you detect an enemy beginning to cast, you may attempt to interrupt them. Costs mana you may need for offense.

nodes.name: Glacial Static
nodes.description: A hybrid strike that chills and charges the target simultaneously. Ideal setup for a heavy follow-up — slowed and crittable in one cast.

nodes.name: Inferno
nodes.description: A room-wide burst of fire that engulfs every entity present. Deals bonus damage to targets already burning. Hits allies.

nodes.name: Blizzard
nodes.description: A room-wide ice storm that chills every entity present. The entire fight slows down.

nodes.name: Thunderclap
nodes.description: A massive room-wide lightning strike. Consumes the charged condition on each target hit, dealing significantly increased damage to those affected.

nodes.name: Empower
nodes.description: Your next spell costs double mana but deals substantially more damage. Interacts with Overchannel — if your mana pool can't cover it, the excess comes from your HP.

nodes.name: Elemental Convergence
nodes.description: Each distinct element you have used recently increases your spell power slightly. Rewards spreading across the elemental chains rather than committing to one.

capstones.name: Wildfire
capstones.description: Your fire magic takes on a life of its own. Burning targets spread their condition to others in the room on death, and any critical hit you land applies burning regardless of the spell used.

capstones.name: Glaciarch
capstones.description: Your ice control deepens into something cruel. Chilled targets struck by ice again become frozen. Frozen targets that take ice damage shatter — massive burst that ends the control.

capstones.name: Stormcaller
capstones.description: Lightning becomes your native language. Critical strikes against charged targets return a portion of the mana spent, and charged targets no longer lose the condition when struck — only time clears it.

capstones.name: Primordial
capstones.description: You transcend elemental attunement entirely. Your spells bypass elemental resistances, and Arcane Bolt scales with your spine depth — each spine perk you hold adds to its damage.
